title: Spectators Generate Loot
description: Allows players to view newly-generated chests in spectator mode without switching to creative.
body:
# Spectators Generate Loot

![Two screenshots, one showing a Minecraft chest with the text "Unable to open. Loot not generated yet." printed below. An arrow points to the second screenshot that shows the chest inventory.](https://gitlab.com/horrificdev/spectators-generate-loot/-/raw/main/banner.png)

Really tiny mod.

Works around the "Unable to open. Loot not generated yet." message, and allows you to view ungenerated chests in spectator mode without switching to creative.

This may result in different loot being generated than survival, particularly if the spectator has the [Luck](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Luck) effect. The Luck effect cannot be obtained in Survival mode without cheats.
